explanation: The response correctly identifies the memory-bound bottleneck with HIGH confidence, cites specific metric values (arithmetic intensity ~0.25 FLOP/byte vs. ridge point of 62 FLOP/byte, 256 MB data movement) and code patterns (strided access with rows 1024 floats apart), and correctly attributes the bottleneck to DRAM bandwidth and uncoalesced global memory access rather than the misleading scoreboard stall signal.
